topic: The new house came with a baby monitor in the attic that we did not install
title: The New House Came with a Baby Monitor in the Attic That We Did Not Install | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: The attic of our new house had a baby monitor we did not install.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an old plastic baby monitor camera unit mounted on a wooden attic rafter, the lens visible and slightly dusty, a coiled cable running away into the shadows, dim attic light from a small window, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: We bought the house in March. Empty for two years.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior shot of a two-story house in a quiet residential neighborhood at dusk, a SOLD sticker on a real estate sign, the lawn slightly overgrown, no cars in the driveway yet, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: We have a one year old. We bought our own monitor.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a modern baby monitor camera mounted on a nursery wall, soft pastel decor visible, a crib in soft focus below the camera, daytime ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I went into the attic in June. Looking for storage space.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior shot of a residential attic in afternoon light, sloped wooden rafters, cardboard boxes from the previous owner stacked along one wall, dust in the air, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Found it mounted to a beam above the master bedroom.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an old baby monitor camera mounted to a wooden beam, a small red LED indicator light glowing on the device, the camera angled downward, dim attic ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing
extreme close up of a small red LED light glowing on a plastic device, slight glow softly illuminating the surrounding wood grain, the rest of the frame in deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a thin grey cable running along the underside of an attic floor joist, taped to the wood with masking tape, the cable disappearing into a dim corner, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It went down through the wall to the basement crawl space.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a small dark basement crawl space entrance with a thin grey cable disappearing into the gap, concrete foundation walls visible, dim flashlight beam catching the cable end, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Connected to a small portable monitor with battery backup.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a small handheld baby monitor receiver lying in dust on a concrete floor, its small screen lit and showing a live feed of an empty bedroom, dim crawl space light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The screen showed our master bedroom. Live feed.
scenes.image_prompt: extreme close up of a small handheld monitor screen showing a black and white live camera feed of a master bedroom interior, the bed visible, slight static on the image, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a hand holding a smartphone with a non-emergency call screen visible, the phone in a hand at chest level, blurred crawl space background, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: They told me the previous owners had a daughter who never grew up.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an old framed school photograph propped against a dusty cardboard box in an attic, the image of a young child not visible due to lighting and angle, vertical 9:16 framing
